name: American Express Platinum Charge Card

categoryRates.description: 5 MR points per ₹100 on travel bookings
3 MR points per ₹100 on international transactions
1 MR point per ₹50 on all other purchases

welcomeBenefits.description: 50,000 bonus MR points on spending ₹1,90,000 in first 90 days
welcomeBenefits.condition: Spend ₹1,90,000 within 90 days of card issuance

additionalBenefits: Zero foreign currency markup - best in class
Access to exclusive Centurion Lounges worldwide
Complimentary Marriott Bonvoy Gold Elite status
Fine Hotels & Resorts (FHR) program with room upgrades and benefits
Companion flight tickets on milestone spends
pros: Zero foreign currency markup - unmatched for international spends
Unlimited lounge access including Centurion Lounges
MR points transferable 1:1 to multiple airline programs
Companion flight tickets on milestone spends
Complimentary Marriott Gold & Hilton Gold status
cons: Very high annual fee of ₹60,000 with no waiver
Amex acceptance limited at many Indian merchants
Charge card - full balance due each month (no revolving credit)
idealFor: Ultra-high-net-worth individuals who travel internationally frequently
Luxury hotel enthusiasts who value hotel status and concierge services
Users making significant international spends who benefit from 0% FX markup

faqs.question: What is a charge card vs credit card?
faqs.answer: Unlike a credit card, a charge card requires you to pay the full balance each month - there's no option to carry a balance or pay minimum due. This also means there's no pre-set spending limit.

faqs.question: What are Centurion Lounges?
faqs.answer: Centurion Lounges are Amex's own premium airport lounges available in select cities worldwide (mostly US). They offer premium food, drinks, spa services, and are considered among the best airport lounges globally.

faqs.question: How does the companion flight ticket work?
faqs.answer: On spending ₹19L in a year, you get a complimentary domestic companion ticket on bookings of ₹50,000+. On ₹30L spend, you get an international companion ticket. These are booked through Amex travel.

faqs.question: Is the ₹60,000 fee worth it?
faqs.answer: For frequent international travellers, the 0% FX markup alone can save ₹30,000-50,000+ annually. Combined with the Taj voucher (₹50,000), hotel statuses, and companion flights, heavy users can extract significant value.
